data.title: A Prospective, Randomised, Uncontrolled, Single-Centre, Post-Market Surveillance Study To Evaluate The Performance Of SmartSet® HV and SmartSet® GHV Bone Cements In Primary Cemented Total Hip Arthroplasty(THA)
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to monitor the performance of artificial hip joints implanted with two different bone cements, SmartSet® HV and SmartSet® GHV, in the treatment of patients with hip joint disease requiring a total hip replacement. Patients who enter the study will be randomly allocated to SmartSet® HV or SmartSet® GHV and will be evaluated at regular intervals following hip surgery using patient, clinical and x-ray assessments
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

i) Male or female subjects, aged between 18 and 75 years (inclusive).

ii) Subjects who are able to give voluntary, written informed consent to participate in this investigation and from whom consent has been obtained.
